tmdbOverview: When a human baby crosses the Eternal Mirror, the portal between the living and the dead opens its path to the beings from the underworld.
synopsis: Las leyendas: El origen is a 2021 animation, comedy and fantasy film in Spanish. It has a 5.8 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a B certification (MX rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
